rulings.Case Title: KENDRA TOMCIK DR et al VS. SIDNEY FERNALD DR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion Of Defts For An Order Of Contempt And Order Requiring Compliance With Prior Court Order Compellingfurther Responses To Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, February 23, 2011, line 4. DEFENDANTS KENDRA TOMCIK, CONNIE TOMCIK'S Motion For An Order Of Contempt And Order Requiring Compliance With Prior Court Order Compelling further Responses To Form Interrogatories. Defendants' motion to compel responses is granted as to special interrogatories 10-11, R F P O D'S 6 and 7. Plaintiff to provide further responses that comply with the court's previous ruling by February 28, 2011. Defendants' request for monetary sanctions is granted. Plaintiff and plaintiffs' counsel to pay $2362.50 to defense counsel within 15 days of notice of entry of this order. Request for contempt, issue and evidence sanctions are denied. =(302/LMG)
